creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
I tested a bunch of different option combinations.  I think everything looks good for the build.

I did some basic run-time tests and it looks good, however when it is run on an older CPU [1] after being built on our package builder, it will core dump immediately.  When building directly on the older system, it runs fine.  Upstream documents this, so I added a pkg-message to warn users.

Thanks for submitting and if there are any problems, please just comment here and we can make changes.

Joseph

[1]
CPU: Dual Core AMD Opteron(tm) Processor 870 (1993.42-MHz K8-class CPU)
  Origin="AuthenticAMD"  Id=0x20f10  Family=0xf  Model=0x21  Stepping=0 Features=0x178bfbff<FPU,VME,DE,PSE,TSC,MSR,PAE,MCE,CX8,APIC,SEP,MTRR,PGE,MCA,CMOV,PAT,PSE36,CLFLUSH,MMX,FXSR,SSE,SSE2,HTT>
  Features2=0x1<SSE3>
  AMD Features=0xe2500800<SYSCALL,NX,MMX+,FFXSR,LM,3DNow!+,3DNow!>
  AMD Features2=0x3<LAHF,CMP>
